welcome.title: Start chatting with AI!
welcome.subtitle: Enter or speak your question, and I'll do my best to answer.
welcome.fileHint: You can also upload files, and I'll help analyze and summarize them.

delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete conversation "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

clear.confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all content in the current conversation? This action cannot be undone.

password.label: Change Password
password.weak: Password must be at least 6 characters long

parameters.temperature: Temperature: {{value}} (Controls output randomness 0-2: Low=deterministic, logical, consistent; High=diverse, creative, surprising)
parameters.topP: Top P: {{value}} (Controls core sampling probability 0-1: High=high probability; Low=low probability)
parameters.topK: Top K: {{value}} (Limits candidate token count 1-100: High=more sampling; Low=less sampling)
parameters.maxTokens: Max Context: {{value}} (Sets maximum context length for responses 4096-262144)

settings.adminOnlyMessage: Only administrators can configure the following API settings

messages.error: Sorry, an error occurred. Please check if the backend service is running properly.

delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this message?

copy.failed: Copy failed, please manually select and copy the code

voice.unsupported: Your browser does not support voice synthesis

input.placeholder: Enter your message... (Shift+Enter for new line)

voice.unsupported: Your browser does not support voice recognition

files.button: Attach files (supports images, text, PDF, JSON, max 50MB)
files.sizeError: File {{name}} is too large, please select files smaller than 50MB

auth.verificationEmailSent: We have sent a verification email to:
auth.verificationLinkGenerated: Verification link generated, please copy the following link to your browser:
auth.verificationSent: We have sent a verification link to:
auth.verificationInstructions: Please check your email to receive the activation letter.
auth.duplicateRegistrationMessage: Please use a different email to register, or log in directly
auth.registrationDisabledMessage: The system administrator has not configured email service yet, unable to send verification emails. Please contact administrator to register an account.
auth.emailVerificationRequired: Please verify your email address first

verification.subject: LLMChat - Please verify your email address
verification.title: Welcome to LLMChat!
verification.description: Thank you for registering an LLMChat account. To ensure account security, please click the button below to verify your email address:
verification.alternativeText: Alternatively, you can copy the following link and open it in your browser:
verification.warningMessage: This verification link will expire in 24 hours. If the link expires, please register again.
verification.successMessage: After verification, you can start using LLMChat to chat with local AI models!
verification.ignoreMessage: If you did not register for an LLMChat account, please ignore this email.
verification.footer: This email was sent automatically, please do not reply.

admin.accessDeniedMessage: You need administrator privileges to access this page
admin.title: Admin Settings Page
admin.subtitle: Manage all user accounts and LLM configurations in the system
admin.deleteUserConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.

llm.baseUrlHint: Automatically filled after selecting provider, can be modified manually
llm.apiKeyPlaceholder: API Key (Optional, some providers don't need it)
llm.apiKeyHint: Format depends on the provider (API Key, OAuth Token, etc.)
llm.visionPlaceholder: Used for multimodal content, leave empty for auto-selection
llm.visionHint: Used for reading images, sketches, etc. Leave empty to auto-select from the same provider.
llm.topPHint: Nucleus sampling probability: High=high probability; Low=low probability
llm.topKHint: Limits candidate token count: High=more sampling; Low=less sampling

systemPrompt: You are a helpful AI assistant. Please answer user questions in English.
